text: The new workflow builder is amazing! I set up my entire onboarding sequence in 10 minutes. Drag-and-drop is so intuitive.
App crashed when I tried to save my workflow with 12 nodes. Lost 15 minutes of work. Very frustrating.
Workflow builder loads extremely slowly. Takes 8-10 seconds to open the editor. My internet is fine.
Finally! A visual workflow builder. This is what I've been waiting for. Great job team!
Saved my workflow, came back an hour later and all my changes were gone. This is a serious bug.
Just tried @PurpleMerit's new workflow builder. The UI is beautiful and the templates are really helpful.
Saw the new workflow feature announcement. Haven't had time to try it yet but looks interesting.
Crash while saving a complex workflow. Happened 3 times in a row. I'm using Chrome on Mac.
The workflow builder is way too slow. Loading the canvas takes forever and dragging nodes is laggy.
Love how I can connect different apps in the workflow. Saved me from writing custom integrations.
Got a weird error message: 'Unexpected token in workflow definition'. No idea what that means or how to fix it.
Workflow crashed again and this time my entire dashboard is broken. Can't access any of my projects now.
The workflow builder seems okay. Nothing revolutionary but gets the job done for simple automations.
Page keeps freezing when I try to add more than 8 nodes. Have to refresh and start over every time.
The conditional branching in workflows is exactly what I needed. Very powerful feature.
Downloaded the app update but haven't explored the new features yet. Will check it out this weekend.
Slow loading times since the update. Everything takes 3-4x longer than before. Please fix ASAP.
Great improvement over the old manual setup. Workflow builder makes complex automations accessible.
My saved workflow disappeared overnight. I spent 2 hours building it yesterday. This is unacceptable.
Error messages in the workflow builder are terrible. 'Error code WF-4012' tells me nothing useful.
Impressed with PurpleMerit's workflow builder. As a power user, I can already see it replacing 2 other tools for me.
Feature looks promising but I'll wait until it's more stable before using it for production workflows.
App crashed 5 times today while using the workflow builder. I'm on a deadline and this is blocking my work.
The workflow templates are really well designed. I customized the 'Lead Nurture' template in under 5 minutes.
Slow, crashy, and lost my work twice. Rolling back to old version if this isn't fixed by Monday.
I see there's a new workflow feature. Is there documentation or a tutorial video available?
Been waiting for this. The workflow builder's API integration support is top notch.
Loading times are still terrible after the update. Our team of 15 is experiencing productivity loss.
The new workflow builder UI is clean but the old way of setting up automations was simpler for basic tasks.
Confusing error when trying to connect Slack node to email node: 'Incompatible types'. What types?
This workflow builder has huge potential. Keep iterating on it!
No strong feelings either way. It works for what I need but nothing I couldn't do before manually.
I was charged twice for my subscription renewal today. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately.
URGENT: I think the workflow builder deleted some of my existing project data. Several old projects show 'corrupted' status now.
When will the workflow builder support custom JavaScript nodes? That would make it actually useful for my use case.
